style_bible: Original premium Aztec-inspired fantasy arcade game art for Empire-1. Jade, obsidian, turquoise, aged gold, volcanic red, deep ocean cyan. Bold readable shapes, luxurious cabinet-game finish, no copied logos, no text, no watermarks.

assets.prompt: Wide underwater temple arena at night, enormous stepped pyramid ruins, broken sun-disc gate, jade statues, volcanic vents, drifting particles, shafts of cyan light, deep layered parallax composition, clear darker center playfield and richer detail near edges, no creatures, no interface.
Top-down ornate player cannon shaped like a rotating golden sun disc with jade mechanical rings, centered barrel pointing straight upward, symmetrical game-ready turret, isolated.
Top-down sleek jade and turquoise laser turret with obsidian housing, glowing crystal emitter pointing straight upward, symmetrical game-ready cannon, isolated.
Top-down mechanical feathered-serpent chain-lightning turret, emerald coils around a gold barrel, cyan energy nodes, barrel pointing straight upward, symmetrical, isolated.
Top-down heavy obsidian bomb cannon with volcanic-red cracks, jade locking ring, broad launcher barrel pointing straight upward, symmetrical game-ready turret, isolated.
Top-down rapid-fire twin-barrel sun cannon, gold and turquoise clockwork, rotating jade ammunition halo, both barrels pointing straight upward, symmetrical, isolated.
Top-down elite railgun with a long obsidian barrel, layered emerald quetzal-feather fins, magenta-cyan energy core, barrel pointing straight upward, symmetrical, isolated.
Wide empty carved jade-and-obsidian HUD panel frame, aged gold step-fret border, subtle turquoise glow, clean transparent center for text, symmetrical horizontal game interface element, isolated.
Circular jackpot meter frame shaped like an ornate golden sun calendar, jade gemstone segments, empty transparent center, four subtle tier sockets, front-facing, isolated.
Wide dramatic boss-name banner frame, black obsidian slab with jaguar claws, emerald feathers and aged gold step-fret trim, empty transparent text center, isolated.
Circular target-lock reticle made from four jade corner glyphs and a thin golden sun ring, transparent center, crisp arcade UI icon, no text, isolated.
Expanded circular energy net made of glowing jade geometric lines and tiny gold glyph nodes, front-facing impact effect, transparent center and background, isolated.
Radial explosion of sharp obsidian shards, volcanic-red energy core and gold sparks, centered arcade impact effect, isolated on transparent background.
Circular turquoise shockwave with emerald quetzal feathers and gold glyph particles spiraling outward, centered boss effect, isolated on transparent background.
Long horizontal projectile trail of glowing turquoise step-fret glyphs, gold sparks and faint jade mist, traveling left to right, isolated on transparent background.
